name: rlm-memory-mcp
description: Codex-native RLM Memory MCP plugin with persistent project memory and semantic file discovery.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent project memory and semantic file discovery for Codex.
interface.longDescription: RLM Memory MCP gives Codex a project memory layer and semantic file discovery workflow. It stores memories and file maps as JSON, starts with the local Codex CLI provider by default, and includes a skill that teaches Codex when to query memory, verify source files, and store reusable lessons.
